Note:
1. Drawing tollerances are considering the part material as metal, these to be changed as per the plastic. We will do the required simulations & study at DFM stage & decide achivable tolerance range.
2. At initial stage part to be redesigned as per the plastic molding to make it feasible for the injection molding. Then we will proceed further for the tooling & product for tooling development.
3. Impeller two halfs to be welded in the post molding operation.Selectionpf the right welding process we are working upon. Welding cost is just estimated, it will finalised after the finalisation of the process.
4. Product designing will  have an additional cost, that we can estimate after customer feedback.
5. All the given costs are budgetory only, Final costing will be based on the final product design made coosidering the molding of this part.
